name_en: 💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】This lambskin handbag is inspired by a brand vintage piece, with a restructured, lighter design that exudes a new personality, creating a classic bag with timeless charm. Embellished with an embossed letter logo to enhance brand recognition.
name_cn:
💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】This lambskin handbag is inspired by a brand vintage piece, with a restructured, lighter design that exudes a new personality, creating a classic bag with timeless charm. Embellished with an embossed letter logo to enhance brand recognition.
Model: 5BG310
Size: W44×H22.5×D14.5cm
Color: Brown/Original leather.
Made in Italy
